• Biomass
• Geothermal
• Ocean

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Energy Resources and Alternatives
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Central Energy Hub -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="40" fill="#1565C0" stroke="#0D47A1" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Energy Hub
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Fossil Fuels -->
  <rect x="50" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Fossil Fuels
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M150,100 C180,100 180,175 210,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Renewable Energy -->
  <rect x="50" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Renewable Energy
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M150,270 C180,270 180,175 210,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Nuclear Energy -->
  <rect x="270" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Nuclear Energy
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M270,100 C240,100 240,175 210,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Alternative Sources -->
  <rect x="270" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Alternative Sources
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M270,270 C240,270 240,175 210,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Energy Output -->
  <rect x="180" y="300" width="60" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <path d="M210,215 L210,300" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
